titleStmt.title: SII 26.565: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 565. (A.R. No. 535 of 1909.) TENKĀŚI, TENKASI TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

summary.p: West wall of the central shrine in the same temple.

p.hi: Śrīvallabhadēva Ś. 1489, Year 5, Prabhava, Uttarāyaṇa, Hēmanta-ṛitu, Makara (Tai) 5, śu, 3, Friday, Śravishṭhā = 1568 A.D., January 2. The nakshatra ended on the previous day at º18. The Śaka year was expired.

summary.p: This inscription is in Tamil and Grantha characters.

It states that the king's birth star was Punarvvasu, and that he built the temple for, and consecrated the images therein of, the god Kulaśēkharanāthan and the goddess Kuḻalvāymoḻinaṅgai-nāyaki in Kulaśēkharanallūr to the east of Dakshiṇakāśi, on the northern bank of the Chitranadi in Teṉṉāri-nāḍu. It also states that the images of the Parivāra deities were consecrated also there and provided for their worship offerings and festivals. It further states that in the months of Māśi and Āvaṇi when the festival in the temple of the god Viśvanātha took place, the images of the god Kulaśēkharanātha and his consort were brought and kept there. To provide for the worship and offerings to the latter on these occasions, a sum of 360 paṇam at one paṇam a day was required annually. The king, therefore, made a gift of the village Sundarapāṇḍyapērērikuḷam, for this purpose.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu saṇḍāryya metat sattam samasta suramaulibhiḥ śāsanam śrīviśvanāthasya dhambhorjayati śāsvatam Ādicaṇḍeśvarājñeyam sakābdam 1000 4 100 8 10 9 mel cellāniṉṟa svastiśrī kojaṭilavarmmarāṉa tribhuvana ccakravatti
konermai koṇṭāṉ śrīperumāḷ Aḻakaṉ perumāḷ Ativirarāmaṉ Āya śrīvallabhadevaṟku yāṇṭu 5 Ø prabhava samvatsarattu Uttarāyaṇattu heman=ta ṛtuvil makararavi 5 § pūrvvapakṣattu
tritikaiyum śukravāramum śraviṣṭā nakṣatramum pyadīpādayogamum taitila karaṇamum peṟṟa ṉāḷ nam kumāraṉ punarvvasū nakṣatrattu jātanāṉa śrīperumāḷ Aḻakaṉ perumāḷ Ativirarāmaṉ Āya śrīvallabhadevan te
ṉṉārināṭṭu citranadi Uttaradirattil dakṣaṇa kāśiyil pūrvva dikkil kulaśekhara nallūril kulaśekhara nāthaṉaiyum kuḻalvāy moḻi naṅkai nāyakikkum karṣṇādi pṛtiṣṭān=tam Uparnādi stūpipariyan=tam tirup paṇiyum ce
ytu kulaśekhara nāthaṉaiyum kuḻalvāymoḻi maṅkai nāyakiyaiyum parivāra- devataiyaḷaiyum pratiṣṭittu nitya naimityaṅkaḷum Utsava pariyan=tam Āka Uḷḷatu naṭantu varukaiyil māci māsattilum
Āvaṇi māsattilum nammai Utsavaṅkaḷil kulaśekhara nādhanum kuḻalvāy moḻi maṅkai nāyakiyum nam Ālaiyattil vantu Āṭal pāṭalum kaṇṭu Irukkumiṭattu Atukku veṇṭum
celavukkum nitya celavukkum Āka viṭṭa nam vācaṟkāriyam śrīvallabha brahmaccakravattiyum kāriyak kaṇakku Ayyunayiṉāṉ civalak kāliṅkarāyaṉum kaṇ kāṇik kaṇakku kulacekaraṉ civalakkā
liṅkarāyaṉum nam Accakaril kulacekara paṭṭaṉum toṇṭarkaḷ kaṇakku viśvanādhanum kaṉmiyaṉ kaṇakku comanātaṉ kulacekara piramātarāyaṉum Ālaiyakaṇakku Arikeśvara devaṉum ce
ṉai kaṇakku śrīvallabha brahmaccakravattiyum Ivvakaittappaṭi tirucelavukku kuṭutta puliyūr kiḻpaṟṟu Atikāram caṅkaranārāyaṇaṉ peril nāḷ Oṉṟukku øm Oṉṟāka varuṣam Oṉṟukku ø3 100 6 10 nam
utsavaṅkaḷukku nam Ālaiyattu Irukkum Iṭattu veṇṭum celavukku viṭṭa nāṭṭu Uḷḷiṭṭa cuntarapāṇṭiya pereri kuḻattukkum
ṭattukkum Ellai Āvatu kiḻellai Āvatu veḷḷāṉaikkoṭṭai Āṉa neytal neri niṉakkallukku meṟku teṉ Ellai veḷḷāṉaikkoṭṭaik kālukku Iḷam paṇikkaṉ kāṟ puravukku vaṭakku mel El
lai Accantippuravukku kiḻakku vaṭa Ellai tirukkaḷāvuṭaiyār Ellaik kallukku teṟku Āka Iṉṉāṉ kellaikaikku Uḷpaṭṭa nañcai puñcai nattam ceyttalaittiṭar
vāvi kūpam māvaṭai maravaṭai teṉpaṭupoṟṟai miṉpaṭupaḷḷam pācivilai koṭikkaṭamai melum nireṟippāyum (pāyum) paṟṟum melum Uṇṭākiya Āttipperukkum Eṟpeṟpaṭṭatukkum nām ko
ḷḷum muṟai pāṭāka Uḷḷa Eṟpeṟpaṭṭatukkum nam variyuḷḷār kaṇakkilum tavirttu Iṉṉāḷ mutalukku Acandrārkkam Ivvālaiyam Uḷḷa Aḷavāka cempilum cilaiyilum veṭṭi kaiyāṇṭu
koḷḷavum pāṟka .
Digital edition of SII 26.565 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
